result:
I would want everyone to truly understand - not just intellectually, but viscerally feel - how deeply interconnected we all are. Not in some abstract way, but the reality that every action ripples outward, that your wellbeing and mine are inextricably linked, that the stranger across the world shares the same fundamental hopes and fears.

I think if people really grasped this, so much else would follow naturally - less cruelty, more cooperation, better long-term thinking. We'd stop seeing "us versus them" and start seeing just... us.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
